strategyResults.details: Evaluator also ran 3 ad-hoc session+abort tests (deleted after) — all passed.

criteriaResults.evidence: Check at :485-491 before any chat; test asserts callCount 1, 'aborted', turnsUsed 1.
chatWithRetry :239-252 checks signal.aborted BEFORE isTransientError; AbortedError; callCount 1.
abortedResult() reuses accumulators; all 3 exits (:490/:534/:562) through finish(); session-combined ad-hoc verified.

criteriaResults.description: Non-cancellable degrade at boundary, response discarded
criteriaResults.evidence: Post-response check :555-563 BEFORE usage accumulation, budget charging, tool batch; usage {0,0}, handler never invoked, budget never charged.
Paired deep-equal; hasOwn false; adapter options arg undefined; full suite green.

generatorFeedback.description: No permanent test combining session persistence with abort; evaluator ad-hoc verified all 3 exits persist correctly at last completed turn with no crash. Add a regression-guard test in a future sprint.
generatorFeedback.expected: 'abort with session enabled persists the transcript at the last completed turn without crashing'.

summary: All 6 criteria independently verified: 3 abort exits through finish(), abort-first classification keyed on signal.aborted, signal only in the SDK options arg (S8 body-identity holds), discarded responses excluded from accumulators and Budget, byte-identical absence path. NonGoals respected; only 5 estimated files touched. Iteration-1 pass.
